name: Almalaeus | Winter Fest
description:
A Big Break before going onto the big fight! Winterfest is here. People sing, men drink, women dance, children play in the snow. A celebration of ages. Gathered here are the locals in Paragladia. Avians soar through the sky, some selling items at the market, some running around. An important day for all Avians in Paragladia. And in this festival is your party. Travelling in order to find the lost city of Archtamia, your party take a small detour in order to celebrate this event with it's people.

((Too lazy to generate images, so using Pinterest))

---


BAND OF THE FOX

Topha Ilva - Leader

31
6'2"


Nationality: Johr-Illan

Background: A man born in poverty, raised by the streets and his single father. He is a former army soldier, deciding to quit after finding out his new interest for adventure. A kind man that hides his sorrows away with smiles and horrible jokes. He created the party in order to finally live out the dream of adventuring with people.

Weapon: A rifle and a revolver made in Johr-Illa, infused with magic stones to create deadly magic bullets.


Khor-ell Javaha

26
5'11"


Nationality: Ivonkavi

Background: An elven man driven by knowledge and discovery. Born into a strict sophisticated household he spent most of his time reading books and learning. He loved it, though he would never admit it. At the mention of adventure to learn about an unknown city, he wasted no time in joining.

Weapon: A grimoire, uses incantation spells


Imani Oreolewua

22
5'6"


Nationality: Umanan

Background: Raised in a small village away from the big cities, Imani grew up a hunter. She, her father and her brothers would go out and hunt animals of different sizes, chasing them and wrangling them down. This eventually developed into a lifestyle, a search for animals all over the world she wanted to wrangle down and capture. It was thrilling. Through this she joined the party in order to travel around and discover new animals she could try to wrangle down.

Weapon: Bare fists and earth magic, exceptional in wrestling and grappling.


Okonma Makau

20
5'10"


Nationality: Ma-Okhaman

Background: He was found by monks by a tree where his mother hanged herself. Taken in by him he would be raised in a temple. He would learn discipline, martial arts and control over Minu. Through this he learnt how to be a kind, calm and collected figure, there as a mediator for the party, which he had joined believing it to be a journey to further his character.

Weapon: Barefeet and Ghostflame, can utilize them to fight in many ways, very acrobatic.

Janet Brookhill

19
5'8"


Nationality: Asremic

Background: She lived her early life quite normally until her village was raided by pillagers at 14, in which both of her parents would be killed as well as everyone else she knew. The only one left was her companion, Sif, her white wolf. She would join a band of knights, spending time under them in order to learn how to get stronger and never feel helpless o
